name: Charente (France)
description: Divided by a white wavy fess: above, a blue field with a white label of three points over three gold fleurs-de-lis; below, a field lozengy of red and yellow.
history: The blue field with fleurs-de-lis and a label recalls the arms of the House of Valois-Angoulême, the lozengy panel evoking local heraldry.

features.role: blue chief over a lozengy lower field, divided by a white wavy fess
white wavy fess dividing the field
three gold fleurs-de-lis beneath a white label
lower field lozengy of red and yellow
